mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 118 > items > Minor Wound Wound Value: Minor Wound is real-
mechanics.excerpt: Minor Wound Wound Value: Minor Wound is real- injury that causes significant pain ad requires medical treatment to heal properly: Examples include cracked bones_ deep cuts into muscle or slow bleeding wounds: For each Minor Wound suffered, the character applies Modifier to all TNs and stunned_ Serlous Wound Wound Value: Serious Wounds are real trouble Player characters are usually tough enough take one two of these and keep on fighting: but Serious Wounds still need prompt first-aid treat ment or the character could suffer permanent disability or even Examples include compound fractures ana damage minor organs_ After taking Serious Wound_ character stunned and must make immediate Knockout Check (see 116).
